content: Deleted my ex's number 47 times. Still have it memorized. Just called them 'by accident' at 2am. I need help 💀
My therapist told me to 'just be myself' but myself is the problem??? Like ma'am that's literally why I'm here 😭
Spent 2k on drinks trying to feel something. Woke up broke, hungover, AND still empty. The math isn't mathing 🤡
My mom asked when I'm getting married. Mom I can't even commit to a Netflix show. I've watched the first episode of 47 series 💔
I ghosted someone who actually loved me because I didn't believe I deserved it. Now I'm alone scrolling through our old chats at 3am. Self-sabotage is my toxic trait 🔪
Rent is 15k. I have 3k. Payday is in 12 days. Landlord knocking. This is fine. Everything is fine. 🔥🙂🔥
Just realized I've been the villain in someone else's story and I can't even defend myself because they're right 😶
Stood in the shower crying until the hot water ran out. Then cried in cold water. Then sat on the floor. Peak mental health era ✨💅
My dad worked 3 jobs to put me through uni. Now I'm unemployed with a degree. Can't even look him in the eye. The guilt is actually eating me alive 💔😭
I'm everyone's therapist but who tf is MY therapist? Y'all trauma dump on me then disappear. I'm TIRED 🚮
Bought mitumba jeans for 200 bob. Posted them as 'vintage thrifted finds 🌸✨'. The LIES we tell for validation I swear 😂💀
My love language is pushing people away then wondering why I'm alone. Make it make sense 🤡🔪
Applied for 73 jobs this month. Got 3 rejections and 70 silences. The silence hurts MORE. At least reject me properly 😭
I rewrite texts 47 times before sending them. Then delete them. Then rewrite. Then just leave them on read. Anxiety is a DISEASE 💀
Walked past my ex at Sarit. Pretended to be on an important call. Was literally just opening my calculator app. PRIDE will humble you 😂💔
I'm tired of being strong. Can someone else carry this weight for like 5 minutes? Just 5? Please? 😭🙏
My parents: 'Money isn't everything' Also my parents: 'When are you getting a REAL job?' Pick a narrative I'm BEGGING 💀
I practice conversations in my head for 3 days before talking to someone. Then mess it up anyway. Then replay it for 3 WEEKS. This is hell 🔥
Went home for a wedding. Every aunty: 'When is YOUR turn?' Aunty I'm trying to figure out dinner. Marriage can WAIT 😭😂
I want to disappear but not die. Just cease to exist in a way that doesn't hurt anyone. Is that too much to ask? 💔🌙
Nairobi traffic gave me 2 hours to question every life decision since 2019. Still stuck in traffic. Still no answers. 🚗💀
My toxic trait is thinking I can fix broken people. Newsflash: I can't even fix MYSELF 🤡🔧
Borrowed 2k from a friend 'just until Friday.' It's been 4 Fridays. Now I avoid their calls. Poverty killed my integrity 💔😭
I cry in the shower so nobody hears me. The water hides everything. It's the only place I feel safe letting it all out 🚿💔
Every Kenyan parent solution: 'Just pray about it.' Mom I need THERAPY not prayer vigils but how do I tell her that??? 😭🙏
I keep everyone at arm's length because getting close means they'll eventually leave. Protecting myself but I'm so LONELY 💔🔪
Stood at the nduthi stage for 20 minutes deciding: 50 bob or walk 2km? Being broke makes EVERY decision exhausting 💀🚶
Does anyone else feel guilty for being sad when there are people with 'real problems'? Like my pain doesn't count? 😭💔
M-Pesa: 47 bob. Bank account: 180 bob. Dreams: Expensive. Life: On pause until further notice 🤡💸
I smile and say 'I'm fine' but internally I'm SCREAMING. Nobody taught me how to ask for help without feeling weak 😭🎭
Went to church hoping to feel something. Left with MORE questions. Faith is hard when your brain won't shut up 🙏💭
I've been 'figuring things out' for 5 YEARS. At what point do I admit I'm just LOST? 🤡🗺️
Paid 300 bob for parking at The Hub. Stayed 6 hours just to avoid being alone in my bedsit. Worth every shilling 💔☕
My bed is my safe space, my office, my dining room, my therapy couch. It's seen ALL versions of me 🛏️💔
Bought expensive skincare thinking it would fix my self-esteem. Skin glowing. Still hate myself. External fixes don't work 💀✨
I keep receipts of every bad thing someone did to me. My grudge game is OLYMPIC level 🏆🔪
Campus friends promised we'd stay close. 3 years later we just like each other's posts. Modern friendship is WEIRD 📱💔
I'm scared therapy will confirm I'm as messed up as I think I am. Ignorance feels safer 🙈💔
Listened to Sauti Sol's 'Nishike' and cried because I have NOBODY to hold. Music hits different when you're lonely 💔🎵
My biggest fear isn't failure. It's succeeding and STILL being unhappy. What then??? 😭🎯
Finally got paid. Rent, loans, bills, transport. Broke again in 24 hours. The poverty cycle is UNDEFEATED 💀💸
I attract broken people because I think I can fix them. We just break each other MORE 💔🔨
Checked my bank balance before buying a 50 bob soda. That's where I'm at in life rn 🤡💸
I say 'I'm tired' but what I mean is 'I'm exhausted from PRETENDING to be okay.' Nobody gets it 😭💤
My group chat is dead silent until someone needs something. I'm not a friend, I'm a RESOURCE. That hurt 💔📱
Woke up at 11am again. Unemployed privilege or depression? The line is blurry and I stopped caring 🤷😭
Sometimes I start typing 'I need help' then delete it because I don't want to burden anyone. So I suffer ALONE 💔🤐
Lecture hall wifi is stronger than my will to live but weaker than my procrastination 💀📶
I romanticize my sadness because at least it makes me FEEL something. Happy people scare me 🌙💔
Went to a job interview in my only clean shirt. They asked where I see myself in 5 years. Still applying for jobs probably 😭💼
Saw my high school crush. They're married with kids. I'm here with trust issues and a Netflix subscription. We're not the same 💀👶
My ex moved on in 2 weeks. I'm 8 months deep still checking if they viewed my status. WHY CAN'T I LET GO??? 😭📱
I've become fluent in fake laughs, forced smiles, and saying 'I'm fine' in 47 different languages 🎭😂
Every time my phone rings unexpectedly my first thought is 'who died?' Anxiety has trained me for the WORST 📞💀
Borrowed someone's campus notes. They're written in ALIEN language. I'll just accept my F with dignity 📚😭
I want to be loved but I make it IMPOSSIBLE. I test, I push away, then wonder why I'm alone. I'm my own worst enemy 💔🔪
My love life is like Nairobi weather: unpredictable, disappointing, and never what I hoped for ☔💔
I Google 'am I depressed quiz' at 3am instead of actually getting help. Self-diagnosis Olympics and I'm WINNING 🏆🤡
Spent my last 500 bob on airtime just so I can pretend I'm connected to people. Loneliness is EXPENSIVE 💸📱
People say 'just be yourself' but MYSELF is anxious, overthinking, and socially awkward. That's the PROBLEM 😭🤡
I'm addicted to potential. The person I could be, the life I could have. Meanwhile reality is gathering DUST 💭✨
Hostel life: thin walls, loud neighbors, zero privacy. But at least I'm not alone with my thoughts 24/7 🏠💔
My comfort zone is so small I trip over it. But stepping out feels like free falling without a parachute 😱🪂
Watched the sunset from my Kilimani balcony and felt NOTHING. When did I become this numb??? 🌅💔
I plan escape routes in EVERY social situation. Anxiety dressed up as 'preparedness' 🚪😰
My notifications are off because every ping gives me anxiety. Am I tagged in something embarrassing? Did I mess up? IGNORANCE IS PEACE 📱🙈
Power went out. Sat in the dark for an HOUR before realizing tokens were done. Peak executive dysfunction 💡😭
I've become really good at appearing stable while internally SCREAMING. Oscar-worthy performance DAILY 🎭🏆
Tried meditation. Lasted 30 seconds before my brain started listing everything I'm failing at. Inner peace REJECTED my application 🧘😭
My uncle asked what I'm doing with my life AT A FUNERAL. Sir we're MOURNING. Can my existential crisis WAIT??? ⚰️😭
I give GREAT advice to others but can't follow it myself. Do as I say, not as I do 🤡📖
Trauma made me funny. Depression made me deep. Anxiety made me overthink. I'm basically a personality SHAPED BY PAIN 💔🎭
HELB loan came through. Gone in 3 days. Fees, books, rent, food. Back to HUSTLING 💸📚
My goals for 2025: Survive. That's IT. That's the LIST. Set the bar low, still struggle to reach it 🎯😭
Woke up to 15 missed calls from mom. PANIC MODE. She wanted to know if I'd eaten breakfast. Classic Kenyan mom 😂☎️
I'm not antisocial, I'm SELECTIVELY social. My battery runs on AAA in a world that needs Tesla Powerwalls 🔋😴
The only thing I'm consistent at is being INCONSISTENT. Even my chaos has no pattern 🎭🌀
Told myself I'd start fresh on Monday. It's Wednesday. Still haven't started. Next Monday FOR SURE though 📅🤡
Spent 800 bob at Java for 'just coffee'. Ate alone in my car. The illusion shattered QUICKLY ☕💔
I fall in love with POTENTIAL, not reality. Then wonder why I'm always disappointed 💭💔
Set 5 alarms. Snoozed ALL of them. Late again. Self-sabotage is my most CONSISTENT relationship ⏰🤡
Everyone's posting gym progress. I made it out of BED today. That's MY progress. We're fighting different battles 🛏️💪
Went to a baby shower. Everyone asked when it's MY turn. I can barely take care of myself. Plants DIE under my watch 👶🌱
My screen time report is EMBARRASSING. 11 hours a day. I'm wasting my life in 60-second increments 📱⏰
I romanticize running away and starting over where nobody knows me. But I'd probably mess THAT up too 🏃💔
Walked past that restaurant where we used to hang. It's something else now. Everything changes. I'm STILL stuck 🚶💔
My anxiety creates scenarios that will NEVER happen then stresses about them like they're REAL. My brain is a horror movie producer 🎬😰
Tried positive affirmations. Looked in the mirror, said 'you're doing great.' My reflection LAUGHED 🪞😭
They said 'Follow your passion.' My passion doesn't PAY BILLS. Now I'm broke AND unfulfilled. Great advice 💸😭
I practice saying NO in the mirror but say YES to everything. People pleasing is a DISEASE I can't cure 😭🙏
Made it through another day without falling apart. That's GROWTH, right??? RIGHT?? 🌱😭
My standards for myself are IMPOSSIBLE but my standards for others are rock bottom. The math isn't mathing 📊🤡
Stood in the shower until the hot water ran out. Still couldn't wash away the feeling that I'm falling BEHIND 🚿💔
Every Kenyan: 'Tuko pamoja.' Nobody's actually TOGETHER. We're all individually drowning, just nearby 🌊😭
I have 347 unread messages. Each one is a reminder I owe someone my ENERGY. I have NONE left 📱🔋
My New Year's resolution was to be happier. It's January 28th and I've cried 12 times. Off to a GREAT start 🎉😭
I'm allergic to vulnerability. Show one crack and people WILL use it against you. Learned that the HARD way 🔪💔
Saw my primary school classmates. They're married, have kids, own homes. I own 3 mugs and childhood TRAUMA. We're not the same ☕😭
The only time I feel ALIVE is at 2am when I should be sleeping. Daytime me is just going through MOTIONS 🌙💀
Sent a risky text. Now monitoring 'last seen' like it holds the MEANING OF LIFE. This is TORTURE 📱😰
My therapist would have a FIELD DAY with me. If I could afford one 💸🛋️
Tried to pray. Got distracted thinking about chapati or rice. God if you're listening, sorry. Also, CHAPATI 🙏😂
I'm a professional over-apologizer. Sorry for existing. Sorry for THAT apology. Sorry for THIS one too 😭🙏
Today I chose peace. Tomorrow I'll probably choose CHAOS again. It's a cycle 🔄💔
Tried to be spontaneous. Panicked. Made a list. Researched. Planned. Spontaneity DIED in committee 📋🤡
I miss who I was BEFORE life taught me that hoping HURTS 💔🌙
My emotional range: Fine. Not fine. Pretending to be fine. That's IT 🎭😶
Lectures at 8am should be ILLEGAL. I'm here physically but my soul is STILL in bed 😴📚
Group projects taught me: either do everything MYSELF or accept FAILURE. No middle ground 📊😭
My comfort shows are the ONLY stable relationships in my life. At least they're CONSISTENT 📺💔
Comrades are protesting, organizing, changing the world. I'm trying to remember if I ate TODAY. Different energy levels ✊😴
Checked my bank balance before buying 50 bob bread. THAT'S where I'm at in life 🍞💸
Sometimes I wonder if I'M the toxic one in every situation. Maybe I'M the problem. That thought keeps me up at NIGHT 😭💭
My generation was promised the WORLD. We got debt, anxiety, and climate doom. Thanks, I HATE it 🌍💔
Someone asked 'how are you' and actually WAITED for an answer. I FROZE. Nobody prepared me for genuine CARE 😭💔
My life plan: Wing it and hope for the best. So far it's 50/50 disaster and MIRACLE 🎲✨
Instagram vs Reality: Her life is PERFECT. My life is held together by duct tape and DELUSION 📸🤡
College is the 'best years of your life'??? I'm stressed, broke, and EXHAUSTED. This is the PEAK?? Terrifying 😭📚
I need a hug but I'll settle for being left ALONE. Physical touch is scary when you're not used to it 🫂💔
My toxic trait is thinking ONE productive day erases 3 weeks of doing NOTHING 📅🤡
Went to a motivational talk at campus. Left feeling WORSE. Comparing my chapter 1 to their chapter 20 was a MISTAKE 📖💔
Therapy is expensive but so is staying BROKEN. I chose broke and broken. Budget constraints 💸🛋️
I want to HEAL but I'm addicted to my wounds. They're FAMILIAR. Healing feels like losing MYSELF 💔🩹
Studying at night because that's when my ADHD decides to cooperate. Daytime is for staring at WALLS 🌙📚
My parents sacrificed EVERYTHING for my education. Now I'm depressed with a degree. How do I tell them this wasn't WORTH it??? 😭🎓
I'm the therapist friend AND the one who needs therapy the MOST. The irony is not lost on me 🛋️🤡
Sunday scaries hit different when you're unemployed. The week ahead is just... more EMPTINESS 📅💔
I collect screenshots of nice texts to read when I feel unwanted. My gallery is a GRAVEYARD of temporary validation 📱💔
Thunder at night used to SCARE me. Now it's just background noise to my anxiety. I've leveled UP in emotional numbness ⚡😶
My default response to 'wanna hang out' is 'I'm busy' even when I'm staring at my CEILING. Isolation is a choice I keep MAKING 🚫👥
I'm at that age where my back hurts for NO reason and my knees crack when I stand. I'm 24. This wasn't in the BROCHURE 😭💀
Joined a mental health group chat. Everyone's trauma-dumping. Now I have MY problems plus 47 OTHERS. Great decision 💬😭
I love deeply, trust RARELY, and forgive NEVER. Trauma made me selective 💔🔒
Finals week: Coffee for breakfast, anxiety for lunch, regret for dinner. Balanced DIET 📚☕
They told me to shoot for the moon. I'm still on the ground trying to find the GUN 🌙🔫
Got a text from my ex. Spent 2 hours crafting the perfect 'k' response. The pettiness is STRONG 💬😂
I'm proof that you can do everything RIGHT and still end up WRONG. Life doesn't follow INSTRUCTIONS 📖💔
My biggest fear is becoming the person my childhood self would be DISAPPOINTED in. Too late probably 😭👶
Lecturer: 'This will be on the exam.' Me: Already accepting my FATE. Some battles aren't worth fighting 📚🏳️
I apologize for things I DIDN'T do just to avoid conflict. Peace at the cost of self-respect 😭🕊️
Everyone's manifesting their dreams. I'm manifesting RENT MONEY. Different priorities 💸✨
My room is a mess, my life is a mess, but my Instagram feed? IMMACULATE. Priorities 📸🤡
Thesis defense tomorrow. Spent today watching cat videos. Self-sabotage is my LOVE LANGUAGE 🐱💔
I push people away then feel lonely. Create my own problems then complain. Self-awareness without CHANGE is just watching yourself FAIL 😭🔄
Fourth year and I STILL don't know what I want to do with my life. Graduation is approaching like a DEADLINE I'm not ready for 🎓😰
Every time something GOOD happens I'm just waiting for the other shoe to drop. Trauma trained me to expect DISASTER 👟💔
My safe word is 'I'm fine' but nobody ever asks TWICE 😭🆘
Bought a gym membership. Went once. That was 6 months ago. I'm basically DONATING money at this point 💪💸
I'm simultaneously the STRONGEST and most FRAGILE person I know. Make it make sense 💪😭
My brain at 3pm: can barely function. My brain at 3am: LET'S SOLVE ALL OF LIFE'S PROBLEMS 🧠🌙
Paid for therapy. Spent the whole session saying 'I'm fine actually.' I literally PAID to LIE 💸🤥
My love language is noticing the little things. My trauma response is also noticing the little things. THERAPY IS CONFUSING 💔🔍
Rent just increased by 3k. My salary? Still the same. The audacity of BILLS 💸😭
I'm 27 and still don't know how to fold a fitted sheet. At what age does ADULTING click??? 🛏️🤔
My ancestors survived COLONIALISM. I can't survive a TEXT left on read for 3 hours. We are NOT the same 📱😭
I want to be SEEN but I hide. I want LOVE but I run. I'm a WALKING CONTRADICTION 💔🏃
My phone is at 2% and I can't find my charger. This is a METAPHOR for my entire life 🔋💀
Everyone's in their 'healing era.' I'm in my 'surviving Tuesday' era. We're not on the same TIMELINE ✨😭
My contribution to team projects: anxiety, last-minute panic, and ONE Google Doc comment 📊😰
I'm not LAZY, I'm in ACTIVE RECOVERY from existing in a BROKEN world. There's a difference 😴🌍
They said 'fake it till you make it.' I've been faking for 5 YEARS. When does the MAKING part start??? 🎭⏰
My autopay failed. Got locked out of Netflix. Hit rock bottom. THIS is my breaking point apparently 📺💔
I just want to feel SAFE. Is that too much to ask??? Apparently YES 💔🔒
